headline: How The Boyd Gaming (BYD) Story Is Shifting With Caesars Deal Chatter And Buybacks
summary: Boyd Gaming’s modeled fair value price target has been trimmed slightly to US$93.73 from US$94, alongside a marginal adjustment in the discount rate used in the analysis. This fine tuning comes as analyst commentary around Tilman Fertitta’s proposed US$17.6b acquisition of Caesars Entertainment highlights Boyd’s cash position, regional overlap, and potential exposure to Caesars asset divestitures. Read on to see how these moving pieces shape the current analyst narrative and how you can keep...
